JUDGE GEORGE CHOPPELAS ROBERT BARRINGTON, SR. FOR THE PLTF. DEFTS MICHAEL MCINTOSH AND DANIEL MESTAS PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. DEFT. LINNEA LOSPONOSO-CHATEL NOT PRESENT. 3:15 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT LOSPONOSO-CHATEL. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFTS FOR RESTIT. OF THE PREMISES AT 237 PIERCE ST, SF, CA FOR $5,000 RENTS, $800 ATTYS FEES, PLUS COSTS, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 10/18/93 MIDNIGHT, 12PM IF DEFT VACATES BY 10/18/93, PLTF. WILL WAIVE ALL RENTS/ DAMAGES & ATTYS FEES & EACH SIDE TO BEAR COSTS. AGREED TO HOLD EACH OTHER HARMLESS & THAT DEFTS AGREE TO GIVE UP TRIAL OF CASE. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
